description:
Product specifications

Basic Information

Item Code:W808P321608

Product type:Single Box Product

Product Name:Kids Bookshelf with Chalkboard Side – Bear-Shaped Wooden Bookcase with 3-Tier Storage, Drawing Board for Toddlers, Toy and Book Organizer for Playroom or Bedroom – White

Origin:China

Color:White

Material:MDF

Product size

Assembled length (inches):16.14

Assembled width (inches):16.93

Assembled height (inches):33.86

Product weight (pounds):21.16

Packaging size

Length (inches):35.83

Width (inches):19.09

Height (inches):3.74

Weight (pounds):24.47

Product features

  • Dual Function with Chalkboard Side: Features a fun chalkboard on the side panel, perfect for kids to draw, doodle, or practice writing—turning organization time into creative play.
  • Adorable Bear-Shaped Design: The charming bear-ear silhouette adds a delightful and friendly touch to any nursery, bedroom, or playroom, making cleanup feel like part of the fun.
  • Perfect for Early Learning Spaces: Great for playrooms, reading corners, or Montessori-style learning areas—combines storage, creativity, and décor in one smart solution.
  • 3-Tier Open Shelf Storage: Offers easy access to books, toys, and art supplies across three spacious levels—encouraging children to develop independence and tidy habits.
  • Safe, Kid-Friendly Construction: Crafted from sturdy, eco-friendly wood with smooth, rounded corners to ensure a safe environment for toddlers and young kids.
